subcodes.first_line: Blessed art thou, inasmuch as the Speaker of the Mount hath desired to make mention of thee on this Day wherein the Call hath been raised from every direction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هنیئا لک بما اراد ان یذکرک مکلم الطور فی هذا الیوم الذی فیه ارتفع الندآء من کل
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @praise and encouragement
